languages.text: {n}Генетор Ферренц сжимает в стальных пальцах {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}серворчереп{/g} — Нунциуса. К черепу кабелем подведена вокс-решетка из которой раздается бинарный треск отладочных литаний.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Генетор Ферренц сжимает в стальных пальцах {g|Encyclopedia:Servoskulls}серворчереп{/g} — Нунциуса. К черепу кабелем подведена вокс-решетка из которой раздается бинарный треск отладочных литаний.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Генетор Ферренц сжимает в стальных пальцах {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}серворчереп{/g} — Нунциуса. К черепу кабелем подведена вокс-решетка из которой раздается бинарный треск отладочных литаний.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El genetor Ferrenz sujeta un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} en su mano de acero. Es Nuncius. Se le ha conectado una rejilla de voco al cráneo, que emite el siseo binario de las letanías de comprobación de errores.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El genetor Ferrenz sujeta un {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} en su mano de acero. Es Nuncius. Se le ha conectado una rejilla de voco al cráneo, que emite el siseo binario de las letanías de comprobación de errores.{/n}

languages.text: {n}基因士费伦茨用钢铁手指抓着一颗{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}——也就是努恩修斯。头骨上外接了一个音阵格栅，从中可以听到错误测试祷文的二进制杂音。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}基因士费伦茨用钢铁手指抓着一颗{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}——也就是努恩修斯。头骨上外接了一个音阵格栅，从中可以听到错误测试祷文的二进制杂音。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le genetor Ferrenz tient Nuncius entre ses doigts d'acier. Il a relié au {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} une grille-vox dont émane le sifflement binhaire des litanies de test.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le genetor Ferrenz tient Nuncius entre ses doigts d'acier. Il a relié au {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} une grille-vox dont émane le sifflement binhaire des litanies de test.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genetör Ferrenz, çelik parmaklarının arasında bir {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmeleti{/g}, yani Nuncius'u tutuyor. Kafatasına bir voks ızgarası bağlanmış, hata testi ilahilerinin ikilidil tıslamalarını yayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetör Ferrenz, çelik parmaklarının arasında bir {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmeleti{/g}, yani Nuncius'u tutuyor. Kafatasına bir voks ızgarası bağlanmış, hata testi ilahilerinin ikilidil tıslamalarını yayıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz hält einen {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} in seinen stählernen Händen — Nuncius. An dem Schädel ist ein Vox-Gitter befestigt, aus dem das binhärische Zischen Fehler prüfender Litaneien ertönt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz hält einen {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} in seinen stählernen Händen — Nuncius. An dem Schädel ist ein Vox-Gitter befestigt, aus dem das binhärische Zischen Fehler prüfender Litaneien ertönt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ジェネター・フェレンツ（Genetor Ferrenz）は鋼鉄の指でサーボ・スカル（Nuncius）を握っている。頭蓋骨にはボクスグリルが配線されており、そこからエラーテストのリタニーのビンハル語のヒスが聞こえる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Genetor Ferrenz holds a servo-skull in the grip of his steel fingers — Nuncius. A vox-grille has been wired to the skull, from which the binharic hiss of error testing litanies can be heard.{/n}
